subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved! Imagine not that I draw a breath save that I remember thee and am mindful of Thy grace and loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عزیز کمان منما که نفسی برارم مگر انگه بیاد تو افتم و از فضل و عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @excellence; distinction, @business; financial; property matters
